Description: Fed hikes 425bps in 9 months. Both equities AND bonds sell off.
Fastest -34% drawdown in S&P history. 23 trading days.
Full bear market. Equities -30%, flight to quality in govts.
Inflation stays high: equities and bonds fall, commodities rally.
+200bps parallel shift in rates. 2022-style joint selloff.
Credit spreads blow out. HY -25%, EM debt -22%. 2008 flavour.
Dollar rally, EM capital flight. EM equity/bonds hardest hit.
CNY devaluation fear, oil collapse to $26. Global risk-off.
Single-day flash crash. Equities -10%, brief panic.
SVB collapse, contagion fears. Rates volatile, financials hit hard.
Goldilocks: inflation tamed, no recession. Risk-on across the board.
V-shaped recovery. Risk assets rebound sharply.
